title: anthyllis vulneraria var. balearica
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. balearica, also known as Balearic kidney vetch, is a variety of the kidney vetch plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria var. balearica include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as providing relief from symptoms of eczema and other skin irritations. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and creams, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
